query: Lithuanian Ski Marathon cross country ski race Ignalina

videos.title: SKIGO cross-country ski marathon 2013 03 17, Ignalina (Lithuania)
videos.description:
Skigo marathon started in 2013 with almost 300 participants from LTU and POL. Distances: 50 km F for men and 30 km F for women. Also amateur track of 20 km.
Next year Skigo Marathon 2014 will be held on 8-9th of March. 
Regulations you'll find here: http://www.skigo.lt/skigo-maratonas_62-lt.html 
You are welcome to SKIGO Marathon 2014!

videos.title: Try Cross Country Ski now- Engadin Ski Marathon
videos.description: In this video I give you tips to enter the Engadin Ski Marathon, one of the most popular ski races in Europe. You will find as well my opinion on why cross country ski is good for you.

videos.title: Lillehammer Troll Ski Marathon 2013 - short version
videos.description: World longest CC ski race from Rondane to Lillehammer. 95 K an fabolus adventure in one of the best cross country regions in the world.
